title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_layers.py (第 360 至 540 行，共 648 行) ---
 360 | 
 361 |         # 从任务目标中提取
 362 |         task_goal = data.get("task_goal", "")
 363 |         keywords.extend(self._tokenize(task_goal))
 364 | 
 365 |         # 从文件路径中提取
 366 |         files_changed = data.get("files_changed", [])
 367 |         for fc in files_changed:
 368 |             if not isinstance(fc, dict):
 369 |                 continue
 370 |             # FileChange 当前规范字段是 path；兼容旧数据中可能存在的 file_path
 371 |             file_path = fc.get("path") or fc.get("file_path", "")
 372 |             keywords.extend(self._tokenize(file_path))
 373 | 
 374 |         return list(set(keywords))
 375 | 
 376 |     def _extract_item_keywords(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> List[str]:
 377 |         """从 MemoryItem 数据中提取关键词。"""
 378 |         keywords = []
 379 | 
 380 |         for field_name in ("kind", "type", "title", "content", "project", "status"):
 381 |             keywords.extend(self._tokenize(str(data.get(field_name, ""))))
 382 | 
 383 |         for concept in data.get("concepts", []):
 384 |             keywords.extend(self._tokenize(str(concept)))
 385 | 
 386 |         for file_path in data.get("files", []):
 387 |             keywords.extend(self._tokenize(str(file_path)))
 388 | 
 389 |         for session_id in data.get("source_session_ids", []):
 390 |             keywords.extend(self._tokenize(str(session_id)))
 391 | 
 392 |         return list(set(keywords))
 393 | 
 394 |     def _tokenize(self, text: str) -> List[str]:
 395 |         """简单分词（支持中英文）"""
 396 |         import re
 397 | 
 398 |         # 英文/路径片段：保留下划线文件名（如 memory_layers），同时拆分为普通英文词
 399 |         raw_words = re.findall(r'\b[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_]{1,}\b', text.lower())
 400 |         words = []
 401 |         for word in raw_words:
 402 |             words.append(word)
 403 |             words.extend(part for part in word.split('_') if len(part) >= 2)
 404 | 
 405 |         # 中文分词（简单实现：提取 2-3 字的片段）
 406 |         # 注意：这是简化版本，实际应用中应使用 jieba 等分词工具
 407 |         chinese_2char = re.findall(r'[\u4e00-\u9fa5]{2}', text)
 408 |         chinese_3char = re.findall(r'[\u4e00-\u9fa5]{3}', text)
 409 | 
 410 |         # 合并并去重
 411 |         chinese = list(set(chinese_2char + chinese_3char))
 412 | 
 413 |         return words + chinese
 414 | 
 415 |     def store(self, summary: SessionSummary) -> str:
 416 |         """
 417 |         存储摘要到长期记忆
 418 | 
 419 |         Args:
 420 |             summary: 会话摘要
 421 | 
 422 |         Returns:
 423 |             存储的文件路径
 424 |         """
 425 |         # 生成文件名
 426 |         timestamp = summary.timestamp.replace(":", "-").replace(" ", "_")
 427 |         filename = f"summary_{summary.session_id}_{timestamp}.json"
 428 |         file_path = self.storage_dir / filename
 429 | 
 430 |         # 保存到磁盘
 431 |         try:
 432 |             with open(file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 433 |                 json.dump(summary.to_dict(), f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
 434 | 
 435 |             # 更新索引
 436 |             self.index[summary.session_id] = file_path
 437 | 
 438 |             # 更新倒排索引
 439 |             keywords = self._extract_keywords(summary.to_dict())
 440 |             for keyword in keywords:
 441 |                 if keyword not in self.inverted_index:
 442 |                     self.inverted_index[keyword] = []
 443 |                 if summary.session_id not in self.inverted_index[keyword]:
 444 |                     self.inverted_index[keyword].append(summary.session_id)
 445 | 
 446 |             # 保存索引
 447 |             self._save_index()
 448 | 
 449 |             return str(file_path)
 450 |         except Exception as e:
 451 |             print(f"⚠️ 存储摘要失败: {e}")
 452 |             return ""
 453 | 
 454 |     def store_item(self, item: MemoryItem) -> str:
 455 |         """
 456 |         存储 MemoryItem 到长期记忆。
 457 | 
 458 |         Args:
 459 |             item: 长期知识条目
 460 | 
 461 |         Returns:
 462 |          ...
